ignoreCommand: if git rev-parse HEAD^ >/dev/null 2>&1; then git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- . && exit 0 || exit 1; fi; exit 1
installCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.30.1 --activate && corepack pnpm --version && cd ../.. && corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --filter @openkit/website...
